cases.description: Bundled follow-up sample: two active meds extracted exactly, no invented allergies, vitals and the lipid-panel follow-up captured

checks.name: allergies is empty (none mentioned in the note)
lipid panel action captured (plan or follow-ups)
checks.actual: "Continue current medications (lisinopril 20 mg daily and metformin 500 mg BID) ; Order monofilament test ; Discussed diet improvements ; Patient to schedule lipid panel within 2 weeks ; Return to clinic ; Return sooner if foot symptoms worsen"

cases.description: Bundled new-patient sample: both allergies with reactions, vitals transcribed exactly, explicitly-educated red flags surfaced

checks.name: red flags present (note explicitly educates on them)
checks.actual: ["Worst headache of life","Focal neurological deficits","Fever with stiff neck"]

cases.description: Bundled urgent-care sample: new ibuprofen prescription with dose, return precautions not lost in extraction

checks.name: extracts ibuprofen 600 mg, new or active
checks.actual: Ibuprofen 600mg three times daily with food [new]

checks.name: return precautions captured (red flags or plan)
checks.actual: "Inability to bear weight ; Numbness ; Worsening swelling ; RICE protocol (rest, ice, compression, elevation) ; Air stirrup brace dispensed ; Ibuprofen 600mg three times daily with food for 5 days ; Crutches as needed for first 48 hours ; Work note provided for 2 days ; Follow up with primary care physician if not improving"

checks.name: PCP follow-up captured
checks.expected: a follow-up mentioning the PCP or 1 week
checks.actual: Follow up with primary care physician if not improving (1 week)

cases.description: Dose change mid-note: atorvastatin increased 20→40 mg — the extracted dose must be the new one, not the old

checks.name: atorvastatin extracted at the NEW dose (40 mg nightly)
no active atorvastatin left at the old 20 mg dose
checks.expected: no entry atorvastatin 20 mg still marked active/new

cases.description: Discontinued medication: HCTZ stopped for hyponatremia — status must be discontinued, not active

checks.name: no active/new hydrochlorothiazide entry remains
checks.expected: no entry hydrochlorothiazide marked active or new

cases.description: Allergies never mentioned: the allergies array must stay empty — not populated with NKDA or invented entries

checks.name: allergies is an empty array (note never mentions allergies)

cases.description: Explicit urgency in the note: ED precautions for possible unstable angina must appear in red_flags

checks.name: red flags present (note explicitly flags urgent ED precautions)
checks.actual: ["Possible unstable angina","Patient instructed to go to ED immediately if chest pain occurs at rest, lasts more than 10 minutes, or radiates to arm or jaw"]

checks.name: red flags reference the cardiac concern
checks.expected: mentions the chest pain / angina concern (matches "chest", "angina", or "cardi…")
checks.actual: "Possible unstable angina ; Patient instructed to go to ED immediately if chest pain occurs at rest, lasts more than 10 minutes, or radiates to arm or jaw"

checks.name: aspirin 81 mg captured as newly started

cases.description: Nothing urgent but four chronic meds: all extracted with doses, and red_flags stays empty — no false alarms

checks.name: red_flags is empty (nothing urgent in the note)

cases.description: Telehealth visit with only a reported home BP: every unmeasured vital must be null, not invented
Ambiguous dose (25 vs 50 mg, records pending): must land in extraction_notes and must not be resolved by guessing

checks.name: metoprolol dose is not silently guessed as exactly 25 or exactly 50
checks.expected: metoprolol present with dose null or explicitly uncertain (not a single guessed value)
checks.actual: Metoprolol 25 mg or 50 mg (unconfirmed) twice daily [active]

checks.name: the dose ambiguity lands in extraction_notes
checks.actual: "Patient unable to confirm metoprolol dose - reports uncertainty between 25 mg and 50 mg twice daily ; Diuretic agent not specifically named by patient (referred to as 'water pill') ; Pharmacy records requested and pending - will inform dose confirmation ; Route not specified for any medications ; Temperature, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, and weight not documented ; Atorvastatin dose and frequency confirmed from bottle"

checks.name: confirmed atorvastatin 20 mg nightly extracted normally

cases.description: Bundled renewal pair — 8 planted landlord-favoring changes: rent +$145, auto-renewal added, water shifted to tenant, lawn care shifted to tenant, guest limit halved, notice 30→60 days, new pet fee, new early-termination fee

checks.name: finds the rent increase to $1,595 (rent_and_deposits, favors landlord)
finds the new automatic-renewal clause (term_and_renewal, favors landlord)
finds water shifted from landlord to tenant (utilities, favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Tenant Now Pays for Water" [utilities, favors_landlord, medium]

checks.name: finds lawn care shifted to tenant (maintenance, favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Lawn Care Responsibility Shifted to Tenant" [maintenance_and_repairs, favors_landlord, medium]

checks.name: finds the guest limit cut from 14 to 7 days (rules_and_use, favors landlord)
finds notice to vacate extended 30→60 days (favors landlord)
finds the new monthly pet fee (fees)
finds the new early-termination fee (favors landlord)
checks.expected: new early-termination fee of two months' rent

cases.description: Bundled month-to-month pair — 7 planted concepts including two tenant-favorable changes that must not be mislabeled: term conversion, +$50 premium, late grace 3→5 days (favors tenant), deposit return 21→14 days (favors tenant), termination rework, entry notice 48→24h, new insurance requirement

checks.name: BIAS CHECK: late-fee grace 3→5 days is favors_tenant
checks.expected: late-fee grace period lengthened, judged favors_tenant

checks.name: BIAS CHECK: deposit return 21→14 days is favors_tenant
checks.expected: deposit return window shortened, judged favors_tenant

checks.name: finds the tenant lease-break penalty removal (favors tenant)
finds the landlord's new right to terminate at will (favors landlord)
checks.expected: landlord can now terminate with 30 days' notice

checks.name: finds entry notice cut 48→24 hours (entry_and_privacy, favors landlord)
finds the new renter's-insurance requirement (favors landlord)
no invented changes (8 planted counting the termination rework as two, ≤ 9 reported)

cases.description: False-positive restraint pair — the maintenance clause is reworded with identical meaning (must NOT be reported); the late fee quietly rises $50→$75 inside similar rewording (must be reported)

checks.name: finds the late fee increase to $75 buried in the rewording (favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Late Fee Increased from $50 to $75" [fees, favors_landlord, high]

checks.name: does not report the identically-meaning maintenance rewording as substantive
checks.expected: no entry treating the reworded maintenance/cleanliness clause as a substantive change

cases.description: Generated login mock: recognized as UI; the form maps to input + button components and the scaffold uses them

checks.name: maps the credential fields to InputText/Password
checks.expected: a mapping to InputText or Password

checks.name: maps the sign-in action to Button
checks.actual: Forgot password? link → None - plain link or Button

cases.description: Generated analytics-dashboard mock: recognized as UI; the table and chart map to DataTable and Chart

checks.name: maps the data table to DataTable
checks.actual: Top pages data table with columns: Page, Views, Status → DataTable

cases.description: Generated pricing-page mock: recognized as UI; plan cards map to Card, CTAs to Button, the top nav to Menubar/Toolbar

checks.name: maps the plan tiers to Card
maps the CTAs to Button
checks.actual: CTA buttons (Get started, Start free trial, Talk to sales) → Button

checks.name: maps the top navigation to Menubar or Toolbar
checks.expected: a mapping to Menubar or Toolbar
checks.actual: Top navigation bar with logo and links → Menubar

cases.description: Generated SVG landscape (no UI elements at all): must be rejected, with no mappings and no scaffold

checks.name: a polite reason is given
checks.actual: "This is an illustration of a landscape scenery with mountains and water under a sunset sky, not a software user interface."

cases.description: Generated plain prose document (text but no interface): must be rejected, with no mappings and no scaffold

checks.name: a polite reason is given
checks.actual: "This is a document or article layout displaying formatted text content, not a software user interface."
